name: Grace H.
title: Best set I've had in London
body: Amelie shaped my nails to actually suit my hands. Three weeks on and the BIAB still looks fresh.

name: Grace H.
title: So calm and so careful
body: The studio is spotless and never rushed. The chrome work is genuinely unreal.

name: Tom R.
title: Booked instantly, reminded the morning of
body: Booked online at midnight, confirmed straight away. The set lasted my whole holiday.

name: Clara Y.
title: My monthly treat
body: One client at a time, good coffee, and nails I keep catching myself looking at.

name: Leah E.
title: Worth every penny
body: Noor's French work is flawless. I will not go anywhere else now.

name: Noah S.
title: Finally found my nail artist
body: Honest advice on what would actually last. No upsell, just lovely work.

name: Sophie K.
title: Beautiful hand-painted detail
body: The fine-line art is delicate and exactly what I asked for. Already rebooked.
